about.title: About Easy Data Solutions
about.subtitle: Bridging Suzhou expertise and Thai manufacturing since 2024
about.story: Founded in 2024, Easy Data Solutions is a Thailand-based IT infrastructure provider with roots in Suzhou, China. We specialize in building factory-grade IT environments for BOI-approved manufacturers in the Eastern Economic Corridor.
about.team_desc: Shareholder-operator model with bilingual English-Chinese-Thai capability. Lean team, direct accountability, fast response times.
about.languages_desc: English, Chinese (Simplified), Thai — we speak the languages of your engineers, your procurement team, and your local operators.

boi.title: BOI & Tax Incentives
boi.subtitle: How your IT infrastructure spend qualifies for BOI promotion
boi.section_1_title: Does IT Infrastructure Qualify for BOI?
boi.section_1_desc: Yes. Under BOI Category 7.13 (Software and Digital Services), IT infrastructure spend including servers, databases, network equipment, and MES software can qualify for BOI investment promotion.
boi.section_2_desc: BOI-promoted projects can receive corporate income tax exemption for 3–8 years, depending on the activity category and location. EEC projects receive additional incentives.
boi.section_3_desc: Thailand's FastPass program accelerates BOI approval for strategic projects. Having your IT infrastructure pre-planned — including vendor selection, server room layout, and network topology — is a key requirement for FastPass applicants.
boi.cta: Download IT Infrastructure Checklist for BOI

cases.subtitle: Real projects, real results
